title: TEMI Space Rocket Toys for 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 Years Old Kids Science Educational Toys 5-in-1 STEM Aerospace Toy with 2 Astronauts, Projection Lamp, Space Toys Gift for Boys Girls 3+
features: 5 in 1 Detachable Rocket - The rocket consists of two astronauts, a spaceship, a first-stage rocket, a second-stage rocket and 4 boosters. Detachable assembly. The astronauts are also movable, and kids can role-play on a cosmic adventure! Each capsule can be independent, or it can be an integral rocket. Children can also learn about the structure of rockets as they play.

Simulate Rocket Launch - This realistic rocket toy simulates the lights, sounds and smoke of a real rocket launch. Install 3*AAA batteries (not included) on the first-stage rocket, press the switch, and you can hear the exciting sound, which makes people feel immersive. Let the children feel the tension and excitement of the rocket launch.

Rocket with Projection Lamp - This super cool rocket is also a mini projector. Slideshows with three themes of space, galaxy and planets, 32 photos in total, manually spin the reels to view the next slideshow. Mount the lens on the secondary rocket, insert the disc, and your child can learn about astronomy and explore the mysteries of our universe from the comfort of their living room, bedroom, or classroom!

Fun and Unique STEM Gift - This rocket is the perfect educational toy gift for any kid interested in science, the universe, spaceships, galaxies, and more! It's the perfect gift for kids on birthdays, Christmas, Thanksgiving, Easter and more. Entertain and educate with Space Rocket Projector!

Safe Assured - This space exploration shuttle is made of safe and non-toxic ABS material. Passed the American toy standard CPC, CPSIA, ASTM test. Safe for children 3+ years old. Please feel free to contact us if you have any questions about this product.
description: Product Description Requires 3*AAA batteries (not included), press the button to emit sounds, lights and smoke that simulate real situations. Requires 3 AAA batteries (not included), insert the slide, cover the magnifying glass and press the button to learn astronomy. Add water to the water inlet to create smoke. The astronaut's head, hand and leg joints can twist. Children can role play.
